message:
feat(search): add search explanation engine and quickfix tests

- search_explain.rs: implements a search explanation layer that
  provides human-readable breakdowns of why patterns matched or
  failed to match against terminal output, including match context,
  score components, and diagnostic hints for pattern debugging
- quickfix_tests.rs: test suite for the quickfix system covering
  pattern-to-fix mappings, priority ordering, and edge cases in
  the automated remediation pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
